briefing.opening: Hello everyone. I will now begin the climate briefing for May 18, 2026.

sections.title: 🔴 Deepening Climate Change Impacts and International Community's Warnings
sections.content: According to news collected today, despite former President Trump's offensive regarding the realization of UN climate response scenarios, concerns remain significant that a 2.5-degree Celsius rise in global temperature will lead to catastrophe [1, 7]. Indeed, ecological changes are being observed, such as the flowering date of the Gwangneung Yo-gang flower on Deogyusan Mountain in Korea occurring two weeks earlier compared to before 2010 [5, 6], and oxygen levels in rivers worldwide are decreasing, threatening aquatic ecosystems [8, 110]. Due to the climate crisis, various global travel destinations such as Venice, the Sphinx, and the Alps are at risk of disappearing [15], and amidst predictions of record-breaking heatwaves this summer and the possibility of the worst 'Super El Niño' in 150 years [19], the first suspected heat-related death occurred in May, exposing the shortcomings of 'calendar-based administration' [100]. The international community is set to define climate change as an 'ultimate survival issue' and address a 'duty' resolution at the UN General Assembly [102, 108], and there have also been reports that frontline indigenous communities are experiencing the real costs of fossil fuels and climate change [101].

sections.title: ⚠️ The Paradox of Climate Crisis Response and the Need for Sustainable Approaches
sections.content: Questions have been raised about whether efforts to overcome climate change could make life harder for low-income populations [2], and there are calls for housing stability policies to be enacted concurrently, as infrastructure designed to protect residents from climate change is paradoxically displacing them [4]. In Jeju Island, the argument has been made that the additional construction of gas power plants is 'absurd' given carbon neutrality goals [33], and the imbalance between rice tariffs and timber tariffs is criticized as a ridiculous form of carbon neutrality that abandons 'timber sovereignty' [45]. Concerns have also been raised that the promotion of carbon neutrality policies could lead to an increase in waste from discarded solar panels, wind turbines, and ESS, emphasizing the need for a facility-specific management system for renewable energy waste [48, 57]. In the U.S. renewable energy industry, a construction crisis is anticipated due to reduced tax credits [60], and in Spain, the 'paradox of renewable energy' has emerged, where electricity prices are rising despite an increase in solar power generation [74]. A dilemma arises in the process of carving out mountains to build pumped-hydro storage for electricity [89], and there is also debate over whether Indonesia's construction of a massive seawall is climate adaptation or an expensive folly [106].

sections.title: 🌱 Domestic and International Climate Change Adaptation and Carbon Neutrality Transition Efforts
sections.content: The research vessel 'Tamgu 2,' which will investigate aquatic ecosystems affected by climate change, is scheduled to be launched tomorrow [3, 13]. Bucheon City has commenced a service for 'Establishing the 3rd Climate Crisis Adaptation Measures,' and Jeollanam-do Province has begun efforts to protect food seeds amidst the climate crisis [9, 12, 17, 18]. Gyeonggi Province has fully introduced a 'Severe Heatwave Warning' system, halting construction when the sensible temperature exceeds 38 degrees Celsius, thereby enhancing resident safety [16]. Gwangmyeong City and Siheung City are aiming for a transition to a green community by promoting their '2050 Carbon Neutrality Roadmap' and sharing their 'Carbon Neutral City' vision, respectively [14, 22, 32, 34, 41, 51, 56]. Gangdong-gu's 'Energy Maru' has completed facility maintenance and resumed operations, expanding carbon neutrality experiential education [20, 21, 36, 44, 49, 53, 54, 59, 65, 66, 90], and various carbon neutrality efforts, including expanding resource circulation policies, operating carbon neutrality experience booths, and broadening environmental education, are continuing in several local governments, including Goyang Special City and Seongju County [25, 26, 27, 28, 30, 31, 38, 39, 40, 46, 47, 52, 55]. Internationally, Napa Valley wine producers are innovating in response to climate change [104], and in Nigeria, the first household-level climate change survey, including a gender perspective, has been conducted [109].

sections.title: 🌱 Expansion of Renewable Energy and Advancement of Carbon Neutrality Technologies
sections.content: The Korea Environment Corporation is expanding talent development, including recruiting specialists in greenhouse gas management, to foster carbon neutrality practitioners [23, 43], and technological advancements have also been reported, such as a Yeungnam University graduate student proposing a method to convert waste into eco-friendly materials as a carbon neutrality solution for the steel industry [24]. Korea South-East Power and Gyeongsang National University successfully hosted the '2026 Carbon Neutral Biochar Forum' [29], and SK is showing positive trends, expanding its eco-friendly business areas and seeing its stock price surge due to a re-evaluation of carbon neutrality values [35]. The Ministry of Interior and Safety has eased investment regulations for local public corporations in renewable energy projects and expanded limits on equity contributions and public bond issuance to promote resident-participatory renewable energy projects [58, 63, 69, 73, 76, 77, 78, 82, 83, 95, 96, 98], and financial support for renewable energy facilities has also been significantly expanded to 773 billion Korean Won this year [72]. G-Philos is targeting the next-generation PCS market to address the intermittency of renewable energy [64], and Korea Electric Power Corporation (KEPCO) views the West Coast HVDC as a key transmission axis for the era of renewable energy [68]. The Yecheon pumped-hydro power plant, acting as a 'water battery,' is contributing to power stabilization in the renewable energy era [80, 99], and expectations for accelerating the clean energy transition are growing, with the introduction of agri-photovoltaics in the Saemangeum Agri-Bio Land being proposed as a solution [84, 88].

sections.title: 📰 Other Climate-Related Trends
sections.content: Today, vineyard climate change experts gathered at IVICAM to exchange knowledge [10]. A resolution on implementing the International Court of Justice's (ICJ) advisory opinion regarding climate response is scheduled to be put to a vote at the UN General Assembly to determine the legal responsibility of various countries worldwide [11]. Hansung University and the Korea Electrical Safety Corporation are operating the 'ESG Youth Campaign' to encourage the participation of future generations [50]. An analysis also emerged that the Shin Hanul Nuclear Power Plant has come to play a key role in the AI era, but faces the challenge of coexisting with renewable energy [81, 92]. Furthermore, discussions are ongoing about whether citizens can help combat climate change [107].

briefing.closing: Today's briefing has highlighted the severe impacts of climate change, alongside the diverse domestic and international efforts being made to overcome them. Wise policies, technological development, and the participation of civil society are becoming increasingly crucial for a sustainable future. This concludes today's climate briefing.
